summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Prisma Studio Shell (Prompt 1/6). Verified all 9 acceptance scenarios from the review request: redirect to /inicio with dashboard cards, sidebar (ClientBrand + 8 sections + Powered by Prisma STUDIO), dynamic topbar titles, accordion expansion + synced ContentTabs for obras/empresa, theme toggle (light/dark) with html.dark class + localStorage persistence after reload, notifications dropdown (3 items), avatar dropdown (Alejandro + Mi perfil/Ajustes/Salir), 4 quick actions navigating to /obras /blog /consultas /empresa, all 7 placeholder pages showing 'En construcción' hint, and deep-link /empresa/biografia activating Biografía tab + sidebar subsection while keeping 'La empresa' as topbar title. 100% pass rate.

issues: Recharts emits transient console warnings 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' when navigating away from /inicio while the AreaChart is unmounting. Cosmetic only — chart renders correctly on /inicio. Consider giving the ResponsiveContainer a minWidth=0 / fixed height fallback to silence it.

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.tsx: clicking a section NavLink with subsections calls both toggleExpanded AND navigates to /<section>. This causes a slight UX quirk — re-clicking the same active section collapses the accordion while staying on the page. Acceptable but worth a UX note.

Topbar.tsx title map (titles object) is hard-coded by section id and never reflects the active subsection in the topbar (per spec — topbar stays on parent section title). This matches the requirement so OK.
theme-store.ts applies theme at module-import time outside React render (lines 45-47) — fine for SSR-less CRA but couples store with side-effects. Works as expected.

ContentTabs uses NavLink with children-as-function; only first NavLink rendering wraps the active underline span — confirmed working but isActive prop is also used to assign 'text-foreground'. Active state currently relies on react-router's default 'active' class detection via class function — verified working at runtime.
Recharts ResponsiveContainer inside grid causes width(-1) warning during route transition (cosmetic).
No tests in /app/backend/tests because review explicitly is frontend-only — no backend exists yet.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this prompt
seed_data_creation: None — all data is mock from /app/frontend/src/lib/data/
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prompt 1/6 SHELL is fully functional. For next prompts that add real content to sections (empresa, servicios, blog, obras, consultas, resenas, ajustes), the placeholder PlaceholderPage will be replaced — reuse the existing data-testid='page-{id}' on the root container. data-testid registry is centralized in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds.ts. Theme persistence key is 'prisma-studio.theme'. Sidebar expansion state lives in /app/frontend/src/stores/sidebar-store.ts. No backend; do not attempt API tests until a backend is introduced.
